Artist.title: Artist
Artist.description: An artist profile for receiving tips and payments.

uid.description: The Firebase Auth UID of the artist.

name.description: The display name of the artist.

bio.description: A short bio of the artist.

stripeAccountId.description: The Stripe account ID for direct payments (optional for now).

Transaction.title: Transaction
Transaction.description: A record of a payment made to an artist.

artistId.description: The UID of the artist who received the payment.

fanName.description: Optional name of the fan who paid.
